# Release v1.2.1

Bug fixes in `savePlayerMove`.

---

## Changelog

## [1.2.1] - 2026-05-17

### Fixed

- `savePlayerMove` no longer calls deprecated `isFieldSelected(index + 1)` — uses `isFieldSelectedByIndex(index)` correctly
- Removed `console.warn` side effects from `savePlayerMove` — return value `PlayerMoveStatus` is sufficient

[1.2.1]: https://github.com/TenGosc007/t3core/compare/v1.2.0...v1.2.1
